components.name: Header
components.purpose: Sticky site nav with scrolled-state style.

components.name: CustomCursor
components.purpose: Custom cursor treatment.

components.name: Hero
components.purpose: Phase 05 scene shell: layered lighting, noise, mounts HeroAmbientParticles/HeroLogo/HeroText/HeroButtons/Header.

components.name: HeroAmbientParticles
components.purpose: Hero-wide dust field; a minority of particles carry/leak toward or away from the logo instead of pure random drift.

components.name: HeroLogo
components.purpose: Sizes/positions the logo mark, applies the breathing-glow class.

components.name: HeroLogoCanvas
components.purpose: Logo story arc: scatter -> assemble (staggered convergence) -> settle flash -> hold, plus continuous ambient + hover-driven erosion/return trickle.

components.name: HeroText
components.purpose: Two-tier headline, founder line, subtext, trust indicator. Single GSAP entrance reveal only.

components.name: HeroButtons
components.purpose: Primary/secondary CTA pair.

components.name: HeroScrollIndicator
components.purpose: Scroll-cue affordance. Not currently mounted by Hero.tsx.

components.name: Problem
components.purpose: Phase 07 scene (Experience Blueprint §10). 70vh, cooler/harsher lighting than Hero, mounts ProblemHeadline + ProblemIcons.

components.name: ProblemHeadline
components.purpose: Eyebrow + headline + subline (subline reused verbatim from Product Bible §02). Single GSAP entrance reveal.

components.name: ProblemIcons
components.purpose: Server-side data + layout for the four symptom cards; passes serializable icon ids across the server/client boundary.

components.name: ProblemIconCanvas
components.purpose: Generic scroll-driven assemble/disassemble particle canvas (IntersectionObserver-gated), with a sparse lost/interrupted flicker while settled.

components.name: icons
components.purpose: Four manufactured (stroke-only, no fill) icon draw functions.

components.name: ProblemTransitionParticles
components.purpose: Stopgap visual continuity for the Hero -> Problem cut: sparse Hero-palette dust confined to Problem's top band, drifting down and fading. Not the real Phase 06 particle hand-off.

components.name: GrowthSystem
components.purpose: Scene 03: eight engines on a circular layout; ambient particles travel between them via the global ParticleProvider; hover/focus redirects nearby particles.

components.name: GrowthNode
components.purpose: One node button in the circular layout; hover/focus toggles focusedIndex fed back into the particle instruction.

components.name: GrowthEngines
components.purpose: Scene 04: six reusable engine cards (Website, Lead, Booking, WhatsApp, Review, AI Assistant - see decisions.md D-014), horizontal row on desktop / vertical two-column stack on mobile, wired to the global ParticleProvider.

components.name: GrowthEnginesHeadline
components.purpose: Section headline/subline with a genuine scroll-triggered (IntersectionObserver) GSAP reveal.

components.name: GrowthEngineCard
components.purpose: The one reusable card used for all six engines; local cursor-tracked hover glow, keyboard-focusable, lifts and lights on hover/focus.

components.name: GrowthEngineIconCanvas
components.purpose: Per-engine particle-assembly icon canvas, generalized from ProblemIconCanvas; local micro-canvas by design, not routed through the global ambient engine.

components.name: icons (growth-engines)
components.purpose: Six manufactured stroke-only icon draw functions consumed by GrowthEngineIconCanvas.

components.name: Portfolio
components.purpose: Phase 11 scene: data-driven horizontal scroll-scrub rail of real shipped systems.

components.name: ProjectCard
components.purpose: Single portfolio card: hover/focus lift, glow, click-anywhere activation for built projects.

components.name: Process
components.purpose: Phase 12 scene: fixed five-stage vertical progression (Discovery to Scale) with scroll-linked traveling signal marker and accelerating exit handoff.

components.name: FutureProofSystems
components.purpose: Phase 13 scene: cinematic climax (Blueprint §16, "Intelligence Core"). Three concurrent particle-engine instructions (scattered network, rotating earth-illusion ring, orbital ring) create the globe/network spectacle entirely via Canvas2D particle choreography, no Three.js/WebGL. Converges into an Earth shape on exit, handing off into CTA.

components.name: CTA
components.purpose: Phase 14 scene: conversion moment, continues Future-Proof Systems earth-illusion ring, one primary/one secondary link, particle-construct entry beat.

note: Portfolio and Process entries added this pass — both were missing from this file despite being built (Portfolio) or just-built (Process); see ai/state.json for the fuller history. Hero and Problem's particle canvases are currently self-contained per-section rather than global-engine-owned — see ai/memory/known-issues.md.
